name: WidgetColor
summary: Contains enumerated constant values to represent logical colors associated with elements of the user interface.

enum_values.summary: The color of the mapping widget u-axis.

enum_values.summary: The color of the mapping widget v-axis..

enum_values.name: WAxisColor
